evals.prompt: Create a custom evaluation model for our Data Engineering hiring. I have example CVs to upload.
evals.expected_output: Creates a custom eval model, guides user through artifact upload, infers rubric from artifacts, presents rubric for review.

assertions.name: shows_rubric
assertions.description: Calls atlas_get_custom_eval_rubric to review generated rubric

evals.prompt: Run my Data Engineering custom eval model against the 5 candidates in my hiring context.
evals.expected_output: Finds the custom model, starts batch evaluation, polls until complete, presents ranked results with dimension scores.

assertions.name: finds_model
assertions.description: Calls atlas_list_custom_eval_models to find the model
